General.Name: Life Concepts Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Life Concepts Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates restaurants in Italian, Western, Chinese, and Asian style in Hong Kong and Mainland China. The company provides interior design and fitting-out services; catering services; and consulting services for organic vegetables research and development, plantation, and sales. It also trades in food and beverages; and offers financial institution intermediation services. The company was formerly known as Dining Concepts Holdings Limited and changed its name to Life Concepts Holdings Limited in June 2019. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Life Concepts Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Strong Day Holdings Limited.
